description_long: This shotgun features a wooden full stock and fore-end, with a metallic receiver and a long, vented barrel. The barrel is topped with a ribbed rail and has a series of blue accents along the receiver and barrel, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The fore-end is equipped with a vertical black grip for enhanced control, and the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The receiver area includes visible mechanical details, such as a bolt and ejection port, suggesting a semi-automatic or pump-action mechanism. The overall design is robust, with a blend of traditional wood and modern metal and polymer elements. The shotgun's coloration is primarily brown, black, and blue, with metallic highlights.
description: A modern shotgun with a wooden stock, vented barrel, blue accents, and a vertical foregrip, blending traditional and tactical design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, vented barrel, blue receiver accents, and vertical foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, ribbed barrel top, and blue-accented foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same wooden stock, vented barrel, and mechanical receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the length of the wooden stock, alignment of the barrel, and the vertical grip beneath.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
